allow: Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\(process.env.APPDATA + '/qiko-aura/aura.db', {readonly: true}\); const tables = db.prepare\(\\"SELECT name, sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' OR type='index'\\"\).all\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(tables, null, 2\)\); console.log\('user_version:', db.pragma\('user_version', {simple: true}\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod'\); console.log\('toJSONSchema type:', typeof z.toJSONSchema\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(z\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('json'\)\).slice\(0,10\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod/v4'\); console.log\('toJSONSchema type:', typeof z.toJSONSchema\);")
